title: Automated AI pipeline
author: NegativeControl7507
selftext:
Built an automated pipeline that pulls market sentiment, news, pricing, generates a chart, and lets my AI verdict with a score confidence.  
  
Just an extra confirmation layer for my trades.  
  
What should I add next? 

Btw I haven't automated my trade yet, still building my stuff. I'm curious about how you guys are currently doing?

comments.author: MOSI1991
comments.body: Hey man. It is very clever. I have an idea like yours. I got some questions about this. Can I ask them?? And whenever you are free answer them.

replies.author: NegativeControl7507
replies.body: Thanks mate! I'll be more than open to discuss, btw I just created a Discord community where people can exchange about trading automation, strategies, workflow etc.. I'd like to centralise informations and learn from people that are some step further than me on this, feel free to join : [https://discord.com/invite/c2QYkWZ3vw](https://discord.com/invite/c2QYkWZ3vw)

replies.author: MOSI1991
replies.body: Thanks. I joined your discord. I will tell you my idea and ask my questions in your dm.

replies.author: NegativeControl7507
replies.body:
Good mate!   
DM or general chat is fine, we might have some people more qualified than me that can answer your question!
